nix.description: flake.lock updates would silently unpin nixpkgs-playwright; the pin is managed by scripts/update-nixpkgs-pin.ts

customManagers.description: Track gstack's Playwright version via the marker comment in flake.nix

gstack-playwright.description: The Playwright version declared in gstack's package.json (range operator stripped)

packageRules.description: gstack Playwright bumps: run `bun run update-pin` on the PR branch to resolve the matching nixpkgs rev + flake.lock
